description_long: This kiosk is a compact, freestanding display stand with a tall, rectangular back panel featuring rounded top corners. The front side showcases a high-resolution printed image of a woman's face and shoulder, accompanied by the text 'LIGHTNESS YOU CAN FEEL' and a blue lower section labeled 'POLYTECH.' The rear panel is beige with white text promoting a lightweight implant solution, and it includes two visible support prongs at the base. The side views reveal the kiosk's slim profile and the curved cutout of the blue base, which forms a shallow pocket or holder. The structure appears to be made primarily of printed cardboard or lightweight composite board, with a glossy or semi-glossy finish. This kiosk is designed for promotional or informational use in commercial or medical environments, such as clinics, pharmacies, or trade show booths.
description: A slim, freestanding promotional kiosk with a tall printed back panel, blue base pocket, and glossy finish, featuring product advertising.
description_view_0: Front view shows a printed image of a woman's face and shoulder, 'LIGHTNESS YOU CAN FEEL' text, and a blue pocket labeled 'POLYTECH.'
description_view_1: Side view reveals the kiosk's thin profile and the curved cutout of the blue base pocket.
description_view_2: Rear view displays beige panel with white promotional text and two support prongs at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and blue base pocket curvature.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign; front panel with image and text, rear panel with promotional text; integrated into structure.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, rectangular top with rounded corners; no overhangs or decorative elements; same material as main structure.
